summary: Handle Stripe webhook events for subscription lifecycle
description: Verify signatures and process checkout.session.completed and customer.subscription.deleted in the Go billing handler.

summary: Duplicate bookmark created on rapid double submit
description: POST /bookmarks lacks idempotency; double-click creates two rows. Add unique constraint on (user_id, url).

summary: Add Postgres migration for billing_customers table
description: Use golang-migrate to add billing_customers with stripe_customer_id and plan columns.

summary: Wire pricing page CTA to Stripe Checkout
description: Frontend pricing page should redirect to a Checkout session created by the Go API.

summary: Index bookmarks in Algolia on create and update
description: Push bookmark records to Algolia from the Go service; backfill existing rows with a one-off job.

summary: Tag filtering UI on bookmark list
description: Add multi-select tag filter to the React list view backed by GET /bookmarks?tags=.

summary: Search returns stale results after bookmark deletion
description: Algolia record not removed on DELETE /bookmarks/:id. Add delete-from-index call.

summary: Add integration test for Algolia indexing
description: Table-driven Go test covering index, update, and delete against a mock client.

summary: Import bookmarks from Pocket and browser HTML export
description: Parse Netscape bookmark HTML and Pocket CSV; upsert into Postgres with dedupe by URL.

summary: Export all bookmarks as JSON and HTML
description: Add GET /export endpoint streaming the user's bookmarks in JSON and Netscape HTML formats.

summary: Archive view for read bookmarks
description: Add archived boolean and a filtered archive page; soft-archive instead of delete.

summary: Reader view strips code blocks from articles
description: Readability parser drops <pre> content. Preserve fenced code when generating reader HTML.

summary: Browser extension MVP to save current tab
description: Manifest v3 extension posting the active tab URL to the Ridgeline API with the user's token.

summary: HTTP and TCP health checks per service
description: Add a Go checker that polls configured endpoints and records up/down with latency.

summary: Store and render 7-day uptime history
description: Persist check results in SQLite and render a per-service uptime bar on the dashboard.

summary: Dashboard shows service down during brief network blip
description: Single failed poll flips status. Require N consecutive failures before marking down.

summary: Send Discord and Slack webhooks on status change
description: Fire a webhook notification when a service transitions up to down or back, with debounce.

summary: Polish dark mode contrast on status cards
description: Fix low-contrast text on the down-state cards in dark theme; align with Tailwind palette.

summary: Add config validation for service definitions
description: Validate YAML config on startup and exit with a clear error on bad URLs or intervals.

summary: Migrate homelab workloads to k3s
description: Stand up a single-node k3s cluster and move Ridgeline and Glanceboard deployments onto it.

summary: Automate nightly Postgres backups to S3
description: CronJob running pg_dump and uploading to an S3 bucket with lifecycle expiry.

summary: k3s node runs out of disk from unpruned images
description: containerd image cache fills the SSD. Add a prune CronJob and alert on low disk.

summary: Deploy Prometheus and Grafana monitoring stack
description: Install kube-prometheus-stack via Helm and add dashboards for node and pod metrics.

summary: Automate TLS cert renewal with cert-manager
description: Configure cert-manager with Cloudflare DNS-01 to auto-renew Let's Encrypt certs for homelab domains.

summary: Document homelab cluster runbook in Confluence
description: Write recovery steps for node reboot, restore from S3 backup, and cert rotation.
